  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Best Practices Limited is a Fleet Management Support Services Company with core competencies in Fleet Solutions, Skills Improvement Fleet Management Training and Fleet Consulting Services. Using a wide range of Fleet Manager Software-As-A-Service and Digital Electronic Speed Limiting Device, we provide cutting edge solutions that enhance effective fleet business operations, safety, efficiency, costs reduction and improved customer value delivery

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos Island,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	We are looking for a smart, organized, and creative individual to join our team as a Front Desk / Social Media Officer.
	The ideal candidate will manage front desk operations while also supporting the company&rsquo;s online presence through engaging digital content.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to visitors in a professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and inquiries
	Maintain front desk records and administrative documents
	Assist with scheduling meetings and appointments
	Manage the company&rsquo;s social media pages
	Create and post engaging content to promote company services
	Respond to online inquiries and comments
	Support general administrative tasks within the office


Requirements


	An OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any related field
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Basic knowledge of social media platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, etc.)
	Ability to create simple digital content
	Good organizational and multitasking skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools

Front Desk Officer Job at Best Practices Limited




        
    

        
        Best Practices Limited is a Fleet Management Support Services Company with core competencies in Fleet Solutions, Skills Improvement Fleet Management Training and Fleet Consulting Services. Using a wide range of Fleet Manager Software-As-A-Service and Digital Electronic Speed Limiting Device, we provide cutting edge solutions that enhance effective fleet business operations, safety, efficiency, costs reduction and improved customer value delivery

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a smart, organized, and creative individual to join our team as a Front Desk / Social Media Officer.
	The ideal candidate will manage front desk operations while also supporting the company’s online presence through engaging digital content.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to visitors in a professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and inquiries
	Maintain front desk records and administrative documents
	Assist with scheduling meetings and appointments
	Manage the company’s social media pages
	Create and post engaging content to promote company services
	Respond to online inquiries and comments
	Support general administrative tasks within the office


Requirements


	An OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in any related field
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Basic knowledge of social media platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, etc.)
	Ability to create simple digital content
	Good organizational and multitasking skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Renewable Energy Marketer",
  "description": "Idyllic Technologies&nbsp;is Nigeria Leading renewable energy company that is focused on the distribution of high quality renewable products from OEM.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Renewable Energy Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojota, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Are you passionate about clean energy, business growth, and building strong client relationships? We are a fast-growing renewable energy company seeking smart, driven and results-oriented female marketers to expand our market presence and grow our reseller network.


Key Responsibilities


	Market and promote our renewable energy solutions to businesses and resellers
	Identify and recruit new dealers and distribution partners
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients and resellers
	Meet and exceed sales targets
	Provide market intelligence and feedback to management
	Support marketing campaigns and product promotions.


Requirements


	First Degree (B.Sc) / HND in any discipline
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Passion for sales, marketing and renewable energy solutions
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Previous marketing or sales experience is an added advantage.
	Preferred Candidate: Female graduates who are confident, persuasive, and eager to build a successful career in sales and renewable energy.


What We Offer


	Attractive salary and commission structure
	Opportunity to grow in the renewable energy sector
	A dynamic and supportive work environment
	Training and professional development opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;idyllictechnologies60@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Renewable Energy Marketer Job at Idyllic Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Idyllic Technologies is Nigeria Leading renewable energy company that is focused on the distribution of high quality renewable products from OEM.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Renewable Energy Marketer

Job Location: Ojota, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you passionate about clean energy, business growth, and building strong client relationships? We are a fast-growing renewable energy company seeking smart, driven and results-oriented female marketers to expand our market presence and grow our reseller network.


Key Responsibilities


	Market and promote our renewable energy solutions to businesses and resellers
	Identify and recruit new dealers and distribution partners
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients and resellers
	Meet and exceed sales targets
	Provide market intelligence and feedback to management
	Support marketing campaigns and product promotions.


Requirements


	First Degree (B.Sc) / HND in any discipline
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Passion for sales, marketing and renewable energy solutions
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Previous marketing or sales experience is an added advantage.
	Preferred Candidate: Female graduates who are confident, persuasive, and eager to build a successful career in sales and renewable energy.


What We Offer


	Attractive salary and commission structure
	Opportunity to grow in the renewable energy sector
	A dynamic and supportive work environment
	Training and professional development opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Join us in powering businesses and communities with reliable renewable energy solutions.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Audit Officer",
  "description": "Blossom Prince was established in 2007 under KC auto investment registered with CAC n Nigeria .Blossom deal on house keeping products, toiletries, car care products and gift item. We have reliable partner in countries like USA, Indonesia, Malaysia and China. With our partnership we bring customised quality products with affordable prices in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Audit Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Determine internal audit scope and develop annual plans
	Obtain,analyseand evaluate accounting documentation, previous reports, data, flowcharts etc
	Prepare and present reports that reflect audit&rsquo;s results and document process
	Act as an objective source of independent advice to ensure validity, legality and goal achievement
	Identify loopholes and recommend risk aversion measures and cost savings
	Maintain open communication with management and audit committee
	Document process and prepare audit findings memorandum
	Conduct follow up audits to monitor management&rsquo;s interventions
	Engage to continuous knowledge development regarding sector&rsquo;s rules, regulations, best practices, tools, techniques and performance standards.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND with 2-10 years of experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;blossomprincelimmited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Audit Officer Job at Blossom Prince




        
    

        
        Blossom Prince was established in 2007 under KC auto investment registered with CAC n Nigeria .Blossom deal on house keeping products, toiletries, car care products and gift item. We have reliable partner in countries like USA, Indonesia, Malaysia and China. With our partnership we bring customised quality products with affordable prices in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Audit Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Determine internal audit scope and develop annual plans

Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree or HND with 2-10 years of experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

title: Job Openings at Dele Pharmaceutical Limited
content:
Dele Pharmaceutical Group proudly stands as a leading force in Nigeria’s healthcare landscape. We are not just a conglomerate; we are a symphony of expertise, harmonizing the strengths of HMA Medical Ltd and Ayo-Ayodele Pharmaceutical Chemist Nigeria Ltd, to deliver quality-compliant medical products that exceed customer expectations.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Dele Pharmaceutical Group is more than just a manufacturer; we are a partner in healthcare. We are the quiet hero behind every successful procedure, the silent guardian of patient comfort, and the unwavering advocate for quality care. With every product, we deliver a promise of excellence, a commitment to integrity, and a deep-seated belief in the power of healthcare to heal, to empower and to inspire. We are relentlessly committed to continually improving the quality of healthcare in Nigeria and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Production Pharmacist (Infusion Plant)

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Production Planning & Control:


	Plan and manage daily, weekly, and monthly production schedules for IV fluids.
	Ensure optimal utilization of manpower, machines, materials, and utilities.
	Monitor production output against targets and take corrective actions where necessary.
	Minimize downtime, wastage, and production losses.


GMP & Regulatory Compliance:


	Ensure full compliance with cGMP, WHO guidelines, NAFDAC regulations, and SOPs.
	Participate in internal, external, and regulatory inspections and audits.
	Implement and sustain GMP culture across all production operations.
	Ensure proper documentation of batch manufacturing records (BMRs).


Quality Assurance Collaboration:


	Work closely with Quality Assurance and Quality Control to ensure product quality.
	Investigate deviations, OOS, OOT, and non-conformances related to production.
	Support CAPA implementation and effectiveness reviews.
	Ensure line clearance and in-process controls are strictly adhered to.


Equipment & Facility Management:


	Ensure proper operation, cleaning, and maintenance of production equipment.
	Coordinate with Engineering/Maintenance for preventive and breakdown maintenance.
	Ensure validation status of equipment, processes, and utilities is maintained.
	Support qualification of new equipment and process improvements.


People Management & Training:


	Supervise, mentor, and evaluate production supervisors, line leaders, and operators.
	Identify training needs and ensure continuous GMP and technical training of staff.
	Enforce discipline, safety rules, and good housekeeping practices.
	Foster a culture of teamwork, accountability, and continuous improvement.


Safety, Health & Environment (SHE):


	Ensure compliance with safety, health, and environmental policies.
	Identify and mitigate production-related risks and hazards.
	Promote safe handling of raw materials, chemicals, and utilities.
	Ensure proper waste management and environmental controls.


Continuous Improvement:


	Drive process optimization, cost reduction, and productivity improvement initiatives.
	Implement Lean, 5S, and operational excellence practices.
	Participate in change control and process improvement projects.
	Support new product introductions and scale-up activities.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Production output vs plan
	Batch rejection and deviation rates
	Equipment downtime
	GMP compliance score
	On-time batch release support
	Staff productivity and training completion.


Qualifications & Experience


	B.Pharm or Pharm.D Degree
	Registered Pharmacist with current license to practice or evidence of payment of Registration
	3–5 years’ experience in pharmaceutical manufacturing, with at least 2 years in sterile/IV fluids production as an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of aseptic processing, sterilization, WFI systems, and cleanroom operations.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong leadership and people management skills.
	In-depth knowledge of sterile manufacturing and GMP.
	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
	Good documentation and report-writing skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet production deadlines.
	Proficiency in MS Office and production reporting tools.


Application Closing Date: 10th April, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Human Resource Manager

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Human Resources Manager is responsible for developing and executing HR strategies that support the overall business objectives of Delepharma.
	The role oversees recruitment, employee relations, performance management, training and development, HR compliance, and organizational culture within the pharmaceutical manufacturing and distribution environment.
	The HR Manager ensures that the company attracts, develops, and retains high-performing employees while maintaining compliance with labor laws and pharmaceutical industry regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies aligned with the company’s business goals.
	Support leadership in organizational development and workforce planning.
	Provide strategic HR advice to management on people-related issues.
	Manage end-to-end recruitment processes across all departments.
	Develop job descriptions and competency frameworks.
	Ensure timely hiring of qualified personnel for pharmaceutical operations, manufacturing, sales, and corporate functions.
	Build talent pipelines for critical positions.
	Employee Relations
	Foster a positive and productive workplace culture.
	Manage employee grievances, disciplinary processes, and conflict resolution.
	Ensure fair and consistent application of HR policies.
	Implement and manage the company’s performance management system.
	Monitor KPIs and performance evaluation processes across departments.
	Guide managers on performance improvement plans and employee development
	Identify organizational training needs and implement learning programs.
	Coordinate professional development initiatives for employees.
	Develop, review, and enforce HR policies and procedures.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labor laws and pharmaceutical regulatory standards.
	Maintain proper employee records and HR documentation.
	Compensation & Benefits
	Oversee salary structures, benefits administration, and payroll coordination.
	Conduct compensation benchmarking to maintain competitive pay structures.
	Manage employee benefits programs including health insurance and pensions.
	Manage HR information systems and employee databases.
	Oversee onboarding and offboarding processes.
	Prepare HR reports and analytics for management.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	7–10 years of HR experience, preferably in pharmaceutical or manufacturing sectors.
	Professional HR certification (CIPM, SHRM, or HRCI) is an advantage.


Application Closing Date: 21st March, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Production Pharmacist

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara
Employment Type: Part-time

Key Responsibilities
Production Planning & Control:


	Plan and manage daily, weekly, and monthly production schedules for IV fluids.
	Ensure optimal utilization of manpower, machines, materials, and utilities.
	Monitor production output against targets and take corrective actions where necessary.
	Minimize downtime, wastage, and production losses.


GMP & Regulatory Compliance:


	Ensure full compliance with cGMP, WHO guidelines, NAFDAC regulations, and SOPs.
	Participate in internal, external, and regulatory inspections and audits.
	Implement and sustain GMP culture across all production operations.
	Ensure proper documentation of batch manufacturing records (BMRs).


Quality Assurance Collaboration:


	Work closely with Quality Assurance and Quality Control to ensure product quality.
	Investigate deviations, OOS, OOT, and non-conformances related to production.
	Support CAPA implementation and effectiveness reviews.
	Ensure line clearance and in-process controls are strictly adhered to.


Equipment & Facility Management:


	Ensure proper operation, cleaning, and maintenance of production equipment.
	Coordinate with Engineering/Maintenance for preventive and breakdown maintenance.
	Ensure validation status of equipment, processes, and utilities is maintained.
	Support qualification of new equipment and process improvements.


People Management & Training:


	Supervise, mentor, and evaluate production supervisors, line leaders, and operators.
	Identify training needs and ensure continuous GMP and technical training of staff.
	Enforce discipline, safety rules, and good housekeeping practices.
	Foster a culture of teamwork, accountability, and continuous improvement.


Safety, Health & Environment (SHE):


	Ensure compliance with safety, health, and environmental policies.
	Identify and mitigate production-related risks and hazards.
	Promote safe handling of raw materials, chemicals, and utilities.
	Ensure proper waste management and environmental controls.


Continuous Improvement:


	Drive process optimization, cost reduction, and productivity improvement initiatives.
	Implement Lean, 5S, and operational excellence practices.
	Participate in change control and process improvement projects.
	Support new product introductions and scale-up activities.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Production output vs plan
	Batch rejection and deviation rates
	Equipment downtime
	GMP compliance score
	On-time batch release support
	Staff productivity and training completion.


Qualifications & Experience


	B.Pharm or Pharm.D Degree
	3 – 5 years of experience in pharmaceutical manufacturing, with at least 2 years in sterile/IV fluids production as an added advantage.
	Registered Pharmacist with current license to practice or evidence of payment of Registration
	Strong knowledge of aseptic processing, sterilization, WFI systems, and cleanroom operations.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong leadership and people management skills.
	In-depth knowledge of sterile manufacturing and GMP.
	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
	Good documentation and report-writing skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet production deadlines.
	Proficiency in MS Office and production reporting tools.


Application Closing Date: 21st March, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer",
  "description": "Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Graphic Designer is responsible for creating visually compelling designs that support Uncle Stan&rsquo;s Foods&rsquo; marketing, branding, and promotional activities.
	The role involves designing digital and print materials that maintain brand consistency and effectively communicate the company&rsquo;s products, promotions, and campaigns.


Key Responsibilities
Visual Design:


	Create engaging graphics for social media platforms including Instagram, Facebook, and other digital channels.
	Design promotional materials for campaigns, product launches, and special offers.
	Develop creative layouts for advertisements, banners, and marketing visuals.


Brand Consistency:


	Ensure all visual designs align with Uncle Stan&rsquo;s Foods&rsquo; brand identity, colors, fonts, and style guidelines.
	Maintain consistency across all marketing and communication materials.


Marketing Support:


	Design promotional flyers, posters, and digital ads for marketing campaigns.
	Create menu boards, product visuals, and in-store marketing materials.
	Develop designs for packaging, labels, and branded merchandise.


Content Collaboration:


	Work closely with the Social Media Manager and Content Creator to produce visuals that support content strategies.
	Assist in creating graphics that complement video and photo content.


Creative Development:


	Generate innovative design ideas that enhance the brand&rsquo;s visibility and appeal.
	Stay updated with current design trends and digital marketing practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or diploma in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or related field (preferred).
	Proven experience as a Graphic Designer or similar role.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Canva, or similar software.
	Strong attention to detail and creativity.
	Ability to manage multiple design projects and meet deadlines.


Salary
N75,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;hrunclestansfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Graphic Designer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Graphics Designer Job at Uncle Stan's Food




        
    

        
        Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Graphic Designer is responsible for creating visually compelling designs that support Uncle Stan’s Foods’ marketing, branding, and promotional activities.
	The role involves designing digital and print materials that maintain brand consistency and effectively communicate the company’s products, promotions, and campaigns.


Key Responsibilities
Visual Design:


	Create engaging graphics for social media platforms including Instagram, Facebook, and other digital channels.
	Design promotional materials for campaigns, product launches, and special offers.
	Develop creative layouts for advertisements, banners, and marketing visuals.


Brand Consistency:


	Ensure all visual designs align with Uncle Stan’s Foods’ brand identity, colors, fonts, and style guidelines.
	Maintain consistency across all marketing and communication materials.


Marketing Support:


	Design promotional flyers, posters, and digital ads for marketing campaigns.
	Create menu boards, product visuals, and in-store marketing materials.
	Develop designs for packaging, labels, and branded merchandise.


Content Collaboration:


	Work closely with the Social Media Manager and Content Creator to produce visuals that support content strategies.
	Assist in creating graphics that complement video and photo content.


Creative Development:


	Generate innovative design ideas that enhance the brand’s visibility and appeal.
	Stay updated with current design trends and digital marketing practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree or diploma in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or related field (preferred).
	Proven experience as a Graphic Designer or similar role.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Canva, or similar software.
	Strong attention to detail and creativity.
	Ability to manage multiple design projects and meet deadlines.


Salary
N75,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using "Graphic Designer" as the subject of the email.
